leadText: The Rock Gem (Japanese: いわのジュエル Rock Jewel) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the Gems and is an unobtainable held item in Generation VI onwards.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Rock-type move used by 50%, and is consumed after use. Fling will fail if the user is holding a Rock Gem. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Rock-type move used by 30%, and is consumed after use.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Dust cloud B2 W2 Relic Passage Dust cloud ( Chargestone Cave , Mistralton Cave , Clay Tunnel , Twist Mountain , Underground Ruins , Victory Road , Wellspring Cave , Seaside Cave , Giant Chasm ) Join Avenue ( Antique Shop ) DW * Icy Cave

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A gem with an essence of rock. When held, it strengthens the power of a Rock-type move only once. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A gem with an essence of rock. When held, it strengthens the power of a Rock-type move one time. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of rock and will boost the power of a Rock-type move—but only once.
